_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.0.2)
+project(omni_base_2dnav_gazebo)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package()
+
+foreach(dir launch)
+    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
+endforeach(dir)
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="localization"  default="amcl"/>
+
+  <arg name="map"     default="$(env HOME)/.pal/omni_base_maps/config"/>
+  <arg name="symlink" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/omni_base_maps/config"/>
+  <arg name="scan_topic" default="scan"/>
+  <arg name="laser_model" default="sick-561"/>
+  <arg name="mapping" default=""/>
+
+  <!-- Map -->
+  <include file="$(find pal_navigation_sm)/launch/map.launch">
+    <arg name="map"     value="$(arg map)"/>
+    <arg name="symlink" value="$(arg symlink)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Localization -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav)/launch/localization.launch">
+    <arg name="localization" value="$(arg localization)"/>
+  </include>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="mapping" default="karto"/>
+
+  <!-- SLAM -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav)/launch/mapping.launch">
+    <arg name="mapping" value="$(arg mapping)"/>
+  </include>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="state" default="localization"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>
+  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
+  <arg name="mapping"        default="karto"/>
+  <arg name="public_sim"     default="false"/>
+  <arg name="robot_namespace" default=""/>
+  <arg name="laser_model"    default="sick-561"/>
+
+
+  <arg name="map" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/omni_base_maps/config"/>
+
+  <!-- Localization or Mapping state -->
+  <node pkg="pal_navigation_sm" type="navigation.sh" name="navigation"
+        args="omni_base $(arg state) $(arg localization) $(arg mapping) $(arg map) false scan $(arg laser_model)"/>
+
+  <!-- Navigation State Machine -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav)/launch/state_machine.launch">
+    <arg name="state" value="$(arg state)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Planning -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav)/launch/move_$(arg planner).launch">
+    <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <include file="$(find robot_pose)/launch/robot_pose.launch">
+    <arg name="robot_prefix"      value="$(arg robot_namespace)"/>
+  </include>
+  
+  <!-- Laser filter (empty for public sim) -->
+  <!-- Laser Scan Merger -->
+  <node pkg="ira_laser_tools" name="laserscan_multi_merger" type="laserscan_multi_merger" output="screen"
+    launch-prefix="bash -c 'sleep 5; $0 $@' ">
+    <param name="destination_frame" value="base_laser_link"/>
+    <param name="cloud_destination_topic" value="/merged_cloud"/>
+    <param name="scan_destination_topic" value="/scan_raw"/>
+    <param name="laserscan_topics" value ="/scan_front_raw /scan_rear_raw" /> 
+    <param name="time_increment" value ="0.0" /> 
+    <param name="scan_time" value ="0.0" /> 
+    <param name="range_min" value ="0.05" /> 
+    <param name="range_max" value ="25.0" /> 
+    <param name="angle_min" value ="-3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_max" value ="3.1459" /> 
+    <param name="angle_increment" value ="0.005769" /> 
+  </node>
+
+  <node name="laser_filter" pkg="laser_filters" type="scan_to_scan_filter_chain">
+    <rosparam file="$(find omni_base_laser_sensors)/config/$(arg laser_model)_filter.yaml" command="load"/>
+    <remap from="scan"          to="scan_raw"/>
+    <remap from="scan_filtered" to="scan"/>
+  </node>
+  
+  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)">
+    <!-- VO map server -->
+    <include file="$(find pal_vo_server)/launch/vo_server.launch">
+      <arg name="fill_with_unknown" value="true"/>
+      <arg name="vo_resolution" value="0.3"/>
+    </include>
+  </group>
+
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="namespace" default="/"/>
+  <arg name="public_sim"   default="false"/>
+  <arg name="world"  default="small_office"/>
+  <arg name="laser_model"  default="sick-561"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="teb"/> 
+  <arg name="mapping"        default="$(eval 'gmapping' if arg('public_sim') else 'karto')"/> 
+
+  <arg name="rviz"     default="true"/>
+  <arg name="gzclient" default="true"/>
+  <arg name="recording" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" default=""/>
+
+  <group ns="$(arg namespace)">
+
+    <include file="$(find omni_base_gazebo)/launch/omni_base_gazebo.launch">
+      <arg name="world"  value="$(arg world)"/>
+      <arg name="laser_model"  value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+      <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+      <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+      <arg name="gui"    value="$(arg gzclient)"/>
+      <arg name="recording"  value="$(arg recording)"/>
+      <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" value="$(arg extra_gazebo_args)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav_gazebo)/launch/navigation.launch">
+      <arg name="state"          value="mapping"/>
+      <arg name="mapping"        value="$(arg mapping)"/>
+      <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>
+      <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+      <arg name="laser_model"    value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+          args="-d $(find omni_base_2dnav)/config/rviz/navigation.rviz"/>
+  </group>
+ 
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="namespace" default="/"/>
+
+  <arg name="public_sim"   default="false"/>
+  <arg name="world"  default="small_office"/>
+  <arg name="laser_model"  default="sick-561"/>
+  <arg name="lost" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0  -y   0.0 -z  0.0   -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y  0.0" unless="$(arg lost)"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.78 -y -11.1 -z -0.003 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 70.0" if="$(arg lost)"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="teb"/> 
+  <arg name="localization"   default="amcl"/>
+  <arg name="map"            default="$(env HOME)/.pal/omni_base_maps/configurations/$(arg world)"/>
+  <arg name="octomap"        default="false"/>
+
+  <arg name="rviz"     default="true"/>
+  <arg name="gzclient" default="true"/>
+  <arg name="recording" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" default=""/>
+
+  <arg name="advanced_navigation" default="false"/> <!-- Requires extra software from PAL Robotics-->
+
+  <group ns="$(arg namespace)">
+
+    <include file="$(find omni_base_gazebo)/launch/omni_base_gazebo.launch">
+      <arg name="world"  value="$(arg world)"/>
+      <arg name="laser_model"  value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+      <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+      <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+      <arg name="gui"    value="$(arg gzclient)"/>
+      <arg name="recording"  value="$(arg recording)"/>
+      <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" value="$(arg extra_gazebo_args)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <include file="$(find omni_base_2dnav_gazebo)/launch/navigation.launch">
+      <arg name="state"          value="localization"/>
+      <arg name="planner"        value="$(arg planner)"/>
+      <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+      <arg name="localization"   value="$(arg localization)"/>
+      <arg name="map"            value="$(arg map)"/>
+      <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+      <arg name="laser_model"    value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+    </include>
+
+    <group if="$(arg advanced_navigation)">
+      <node pkg="pal_zoi_detector" type="zoi_detector_node" name="zoi_detector" />
+      <include file="$(find pal_waypoint)/launch/pal_waypoint.launch"/>
+      <include file="$(find pal_navigation_manager)/launch/poi_navigation_server.launch"/>
+      <include file="$(find pal_map_utils)/launch/map_configuration_server.launch">
+        <env name="PAL_HOST" value="omni_basec"/>
+      </include>
+    </group>
+
+    <group if="$(arg advanced_navigation)">
+      <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+            args="-d $(find omni_base_2dnav)/config/rviz/advanced_navigation.rviz"/>
+    </group>
+    <group unless="$(arg advanced_navigation)">
+      <node name="rviz" pkg="rviz" type="rviz" if="$(arg rviz)"
+            args="-d $(find omni_base_2dnav)/config/rviz/navigation.rviz"/>
+    </group>
+  </group>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@

+<package format="2">
+  <name>omni_base_2dnav_gazebo</name>

+  <exec_depend>omni_base_2dnav</exec_depend>
+
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+###################################
+## catkin specific configuration ##
+###################################
+catkin_package()
+
+#############
+## Install ##
+#############
+
+install(DIRECTORY config launch
+  DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}
+)
+
+#############
+## Testing ##

+# endif()
+
+## Add folders to be run by python nosetests
+# catkin_add_nosetests(test)

@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+mobile_base_controller:
+  type        : "omni_drive_controller/OmniDriveController"
+  left_front_wheel  :   'wheel_front_left_joint'
+  left_back_wheel   :   'wheel_back_left_joint'
+  right_front_wheel :   'wheel_front_right_joint'
+  right_back_wheel :    'wheel_back_right_joint'
+  publish_rate: 0.0
+  pose_covariance_diagonal : [0.001, 0.001, 1.0e-3, 1.0e-3, 1.0e-3, 0.01]
+  twist_covariance_diagonal: [0.001, 0.001, 1.0e-3, 1.0e-3, 1.0e-3, 0.01]
+
+  enable_pose_covariance_update: true
+  error_constant_left : 0.001
+  error_constant_right: 0.001
+
+  # Velocity commands timeout [s]
+  cmd_vel_timeout: 0.25
+
+  # Base frame_id
+  base_frame_id: base_footprint
+
+  # Base frame_id
+  odom_frame_id: odom
+
+  # Preserve turning radius when limiting speed/acceleration/jerk
+  preserve_turning_radius: true
+
+  # Publish limited velocity
+  publish_cmd: false
+
+  # Publish wheel data
+  publish_wheel_data: true
+
+  # Velocity and acceleration limits
+  # Whenever a min_* is unspecified, default to -max_*
+  linear:
+    x:
+      has_velocity_limits    : true
+      max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
+      min_velocity           : -1.0 # m/s
+      has_acceleration_limits: true
+      max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
+      has_jerk_limits        : false
+      max_jerk               :  5.0 # m/s^3
+    y:
+      has_velocity_limits    : true
+      max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
+      min_velocity           : -1.0 # m/s
+      has_acceleration_limits: true
+      max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
+      has_jerk_limits        : false
+      max_jerk               :  5.0 # m/s^3
+  angular:
+    z:
+      has_velocity_limits    : true
+      max_velocity           : !degrees 120.0 # reduce pendulum effect
+      has_acceleration_limits: true
+      max_acceleration       : !degrees 120.0
+      has_jerk_limits        : false
+      max_jerk               : !degrees 600.0

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix" default=""/>
+
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find omni_base_controller_configuration)/config/joint_state_controller_extra_joints.yaml" ns="joint_state_controller"/>
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find joint_state_controller)/joint_state_controller.yaml" />
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/mobile_base_controller.yaml"/>
+
+  <param name="mobile_base_controller/base_frame_id" value="$(arg tf_prefix)/base_footprint"/>
+  <param name="mobile_base_controller/odom_frame_id" value="$(arg tf_prefix)/odom"/>
+
+  <!-- Set up controllers -->
+  <arg name="controller_list"
+       value="joint_state_controller
+              mobile_base_controller"/>
+
+  <!-- Controllers that come up started -->
+  <node name="default_controllers_spawner"
+        pkg="controller_manager" type="spawner" output="screen"
+        args="--timeout 120
+             $(arg controller_list) " />
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+
+<launch>
+  <arg name="world"  default="empty"/>  <!-- empty, ... (see ../worlds) -->
+  <arg name="laser_model"  default="sick-561"/>
+  <arg name="multi" default=""/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0.0 -y 0.0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+  <arg name="gui" default="true"/>
+  <arg name="debug" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="public_sim" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="recording" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" default=""/>
+
+  <env name="LC_NUMERIC" value="C" />
+
+  <!-- start up world -->
+  <include file="$(find pal_gazebo_worlds)/launch/pal_gazebo.launch">
+    <arg name="world" value="$(arg world)"/>
+    <arg name="gui" value="$(arg gui)"/>
+    <arg name="debug" value="$(arg debug)"/>
+    <arg name="recording" value="$(arg recording)"/>
+    <arg name="extra_gz_model_path" value="$(find omni_base_gazebo)/models"/>
+    <arg name="extra_gz_resource_path" value="$(find omni_base_gazebo)"/>
+    <arg name="extra_gazebo_args" value="$(arg extra_gazebo_args)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- spawn robot in simulation -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_gazebo)/launch/omni_base_spawn.launch">
+    <arg name="laser_model"  value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+    <arg name="multi" value="$(arg multi)"/>
+    <arg name="gzpose" value="$(arg gzpose)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- bring up robot -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_gazebo)/launch/simulation_omni_base_bringup.launch">
+    <arg name="public_sim"  value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+  </include>
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="laser_model"  default="sick-571"/>
+  <arg name="gzpose" default="-x 0 -y 0 -z 0.0 -R 0.0 -P 0.0 -Y 0.0"/>
+  <arg name="multi" default=""/>
+  <arg name="model_name" default="omni_base"/>
+
+  <rosparam ns="pal_robot_info" param="type">"omni_base"</rosparam>
+
+  <!-- PID gains -->
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/pids.yaml"/>
+
+  <!-- Robot model -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_description)/robots/upload.launch">
+    <arg name="laser_model" value="$(arg laser_model)"/>
+    <arg name="multi"  value="$(arg multi)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Spawn robot in Gazebo -->
+  <node pkg="gazebo_ros" type="spawn_model" name="spawn_model"
+    args="-urdf -param robot_description $(arg gzpose) -model $(arg model_name)" />
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="public_sim"     default="false"/>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix" default=""/>
+
+  <!-- Joint trajectory and omni drive controllers -->
+  <rosparam command="load" file="$(find omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)/config/mobile_base_controller.yaml"/>
+
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)/launch/default_controllers.launch">
+    <arg name="tf_prefix" value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Robot state publisher -->
+  <node pkg="robot_state_publisher" type="robot_state_publisher" name="robot_state_publisher">
+    <param name="publish_frequency" type="double" value="50.0"/>
+    <param name="tf_prefix" type="string" value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+  </node>
+
+  <!-- TF lookup -->
+  <node pkg="tf_lookup" type="tf_lookup" name="tf_lookup" output="screen"/>
+
+  <!-- Twist mux -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_bringup)/launch/twist_mux.launch"/>
+
+  <!-- Joystick controller -->
+  <include file="$(find omni_base_bringup)/launch/joystick_teleop.launch"/>
+
+</launch>

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
-project(omni_base_controller_configuration_gazebo)
-
-find_package(ament_cmake_auto REQUIRED)
-
-# PAL Robotics stricter build flags, other developers should not worry about this
-find_package(ament_cmake_pal QUIET)
-
-ament_auto_find_build_dependencies()
-
-ament_auto_package(INSTALL_TO_SHARE config launch)

@@ -1,66 +0,0 @@
-mobile_base_controller:
-  ros__parameters:
-    type: omni_drive_controller/OmniDriveController
-    use_stamped_vel: False
-    left_front_wheel_names  : ['wheel_front_left_joint']
-    left_rear_wheel_names  : ['wheel_rear_left_joint']
-    right_front_wheel_names : ['wheel_front_right_joint']
-    right_rear_wheel_names : ['wheel_rear_right_joint']
-
-    # In ROS1 these physical properties were parsed from the URDF
-    wheel_radius: 0.0985
-    wheel_separation: 0.4044
-
-    wheel_separation_multiplier: 1.0
-    left_wheel_radius_multiplier: 1.0
-    right_wheel_radius_multiplier: 1.0
-
-    # The params below were used in ROS1 but not yet in ROS2
-
-    publish_rate: 0.0
-    pose_covariance_diagonal : [0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.01]
-    twist_covariance_diagonal: [0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.01]
-
-    # Velocity commands timeout [s]
-    cmd_vel_timeout: 0.25
-
-    # Base frame_id
-    base_frame_id: base_footprint
-
-    # Publish limited velocity
-    publish_limited_velocity: true
-
-    # Velocity and acceleration limits
-    # Whenever a min_* is unspecified, default to -max_*
-    linear:
-      x:
-        has_velocity_limits    : true
-        max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
-        min_velocity           : -1.0 # m/s
-        has_acceleration_limits: true
-        max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
-        has_jerk_limits        : false
-        max_jerk               :  5.0 # m/s^3
-      y:
-        has_velocity_limits    : true
-        max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
-        min_velocity           : -1.0 # m/s
-        has_acceleration_limits: true
-        max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
-        has_jerk_limits        : false
-        max_jerk               :  5.0 # m/s^3
-    angular:
-      z:
-        has_velocity_limits    : true
-        max_velocity           : 2.09 # 120.0º reduce pendulum effect
-        has_acceleration_limits: true
-        max_acceleration       : 2.09 # 120.0º
-        has_jerk_limits        : false
-        max_jerk               : 10.47 # 600.0º
-    space:
-      xy:
-        max_velocity           : 0.7
-      xz:
-        max_velocity           : 0.5
-      xyz:
-        max_velocity           : 0.4

data.author: doterkuile

Merge branch 'omm/feat/public_sim_control' into 'humble-devel'

is_public_sim check

See merge request robots/omni_base_simulation!15

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 from os import environ, pathsep
 
 from ament_index_python.packages import get_package_prefix, get_package_share_directory
-
+from launch_pal.actions import CheckPublicSim
 from launch import LaunchDescription
 from launch.actions import DeclareLaunchArgument, IncludeLaunchDescription, SetEnvironmentVariable
 from launch.conditions import IfCondition
@@ -33,11 +33,19 @@ def generate_launch_description():
         description='Specify if launching Navigation2'
     )
 
+    is_public_sim = DeclareLaunchArgument(
+        name='is_public_sim',
+        default_value='false',
+        description='Enable public simulation.',
+    )
+
     gazebo = IncludeLaunchDescription(
         PythonLaunchDescriptionSource([os.path.join(
             get_package_share_directory('pal_gazebo_worlds'), 'launch'), '/pal_gazebo.launch.py']),
     )
 
+    check_public_sim = CheckPublicSim()
+
     omni_base_spawn = include_launch_py_description(
         'omni_base_gazebo', ['launch', 'omni_base_spawn.launch.py'])
     omni_base_bringup = include_launch_py_description(
@@ -65,6 +73,8 @@ def generate_launch_description():

+    ld.add_action(is_public_sim)
+    ld.add_action(check_public_sim)
     ld.add_action(gazebo)
     ld.add_action(omni_base_spawn)
     ld.add_action(omni_base_bringup)
